findings.title: SQL injection via unsanitized query parameter
findings.description: The endpoint /api/users accepts a raw search query parameter and interpolates it directly into a SQL query without parameterization.
findings.fix_prompt: Replace the string-interpolated SQL in src/routes/users.ts:47 with a parameterized query using $1 placeholders.

findings.title: Hardcoded JWT secret in source code
findings.description: The JWT signing secret is hardcoded as a string literal in the auth middleware, visible to anyone with repo access.
findings.fix_prompt: Move the JWT secret to process.env.JWT_SECRET in src/middleware/auth.ts:8.

findings.title: Missing rate limiting on authentication endpoint
findings.description: POST /api/auth/login has no rate limiting, allowing brute-force password attacks.
findings.fix_prompt: Add @fastify/rate-limit to the login endpoint with max: 5, timeWindow: 15 minutes.

findings.title: CORS allows all origins in production
findings.description: CORS config uses origin: '*' allowing any website to make authenticated requests.
findings.fix_prompt: Restrict CORS origins to your frontend domain.

findings.title: Session tokens stored in localStorage
findings.description: Auth tokens in localStorage are accessible to any JS on the page, vulnerable to XSS.
findings.fix_prompt: Replace localStorage with httpOnly cookies.

findings.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy header
findings.description: No CSP header set, increasing XSS attack surface.
findings.fix_prompt: Add CSP header using @fastify/helmet.

findings.title: Unhandled promise rejection in payment processor
findings.description: Payment processing calls Stripe without try/catch. Unhandled rejection crashes the process.
findings.fix_prompt: Wrap the Stripe call in try/catch, throw typed PaymentError.

findings.title: DB connection pool leaks connections on error
findings.description: Failed queries never release the connection back to the pool.
findings.fix_prompt: Use try/finally to ensure client.release() always runs.

findings.title: Missing health check endpoint
findings.description: No liveness probe endpoint for container orchestration.
findings.fix_prompt: Add GET /health returning { status: 'ok' }.

findings.title: No graceful shutdown handler
findings.description: Server doesn't handle SIGTERM/SIGINT. In-flight requests dropped during deploys.
findings.fix_prompt: Add signal handlers that call app.close().

findings.title: No retry logic for transient API failures
findings.description: Webhook calls fail permanently on first network timeout.
findings.fix_prompt: Add exponential backoff retry for 5xx and network errors.

findings.title: Consider circuit breaker for Stripe dependency
findings.description: No circuit breaker means a Stripe outage cascades into full service failure.
findings.fix_prompt: Consider opossum circuit breaker for Stripe calls.

findings.title: God object: UserService has 14 responsibilities
findings.description: 580-line class handles auth, profiles, notifications, billing, permissions, and reporting.
findings.fix_prompt: Split into AuthService, ProfileService, BillingService, etc.

findings.title: Magic numbers in pricing calculation
findings.description: Unexplained literals 0.029, 0.30, 1.15 without named constants.
findings.snippet:
const fee = amount * 0.029 + 0.30;
const total = subtotal * 1.15;
findings.fix_prompt: Extract into STRIPE_PERCENTAGE_FEE, STRIPE_FIXED_FEE, TAX_MULTIPLIER.

findings.title: Duplicated validation regex across 4 files
findings.description: Email regex copy-pasted in user, contact, billing, invite routes.
findings.fix_prompt: Extract to shared src/lib/validators.ts.

findings.title: 6 levels of nested callbacks in order processor
findings.description: Deep nesting makes control flow nearly impossible to follow.
findings.fix_prompt: Flatten with early returns and extracted helpers.

findings.title: Inconsistent error response format
findings.description: Endpoints return { error }, { message, code }, or plain strings.
findings.fix_prompt: Standardize on { error: string } via shared helper.

findings.title: Manual if-check validation instead of Zod
findings.description: Zod is already a dependency but not used for request validation.
findings.fix_prompt: Adopt Zod schemas for all request validation.

findings.title: Stale TODO comments from October 2025
findings.description: 3 forgotten TODOs referencing work from 6 months ago.
findings.fix_prompt: Resolve or remove stale TODOs.

findings.title: N+1 query in order listing
findings.description: 100 orders = 101 queries. Items fetched one-by-one in a loop.
findings.fix_prompt: Replace with a single JOIN query.

findings.title: Missing index on orders.user_id
findings.description: Frequently queried column causes full table scans.
findings.fix_prompt: CREATE INDEX idx_orders_user_id ON orders(user_id);

findings.title: Sync file read blocks event loop
findings.description: readFileSync in a route handler blocks all concurrent requests.
findings.fix_prompt: Use fs.promises.readFile or cache at startup.

findings.title: Zero test coverage for auth flows
findings.description: Login, register, password reset, token refresh — all untested.
findings.fix_prompt: Create auth.test.ts with login/register/token tests.

findings.title: Integration tests mock the database
findings.description: jest.mock means tests pass even when SQL is broken.
findings.fix_prompt: Use a real test database instead of mocks.

findings.title: Pricing test has no value assertions
findings.description: Only checks the function doesn't throw. Never verifies calculated price.
findings.fix_prompt: Assert actual return values match expected prices.

findings.title: Flaky test: timing dependency on Date.now()
findings.description: Fails intermittently around midnight or in different timezones.
findings.fix_prompt: Use vi.useFakeTimers for deterministic time.

findings.title: No error path tests
findings.description: Only happy path tested. No 400/404/500 response tests.
findings.fix_prompt: Add tests for invalid input, not-found, and server errors.

findings.title: No API contract tests
findings.description: OpenAPI spec may drift from actual implementation.
findings.fix_prompt: Add contract tests against the OpenAPI spec.

findings.title: Cyclomatic complexity 28 in permission checker
findings.description: 28 decision paths. Nearly impossible to reason about or test exhaustively.
findings.fix_prompt: Replace branching with a Map<Role, Set<Permission>> lookup.

findings.title: 12-variant discriminated union type
findings.description: ApiResponse union is unwieldy and slows type-checking.
findings.fix_prompt: Simplify to generic Result<T> pattern.

findings.title: Triple middleware wrapping on every route
findings.description: auth(), validate(), log() applied individually to each route.
findings.fix_prompt: Use route-group middleware or a routeFactory helper.

findings.title: Config loaded from 4 sources, unclear precedence
findings.description: .env, config.json, CLI args, hardcoded defaults — no documented merge order.
findings.fix_prompt: Consolidate with explicit precedence in loadConfig().

findings.title: 5 endpoints missing from OpenAPI spec
findings.description: Recently added endpoints not documented.
findings.fix_prompt: Add missing endpoints to openapi.yaml.

findings.title: README references deleted npm script
findings.description: npm run seed no longer exists.
findings.fix_prompt: Update README with current setup steps.

findings.title: 3 env vars undocumented
findings.description: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, REDIS_URL, LOG_FORMAT not in .env.example.
findings.fix_prompt: Add missing vars to .env.example.

findings.title: No architecture decision records
findings.description: Key tech choices (Fastify, Drizzle) undocumented.
findings.fix_prompt: Create docs/adr/ with decision records.

findings.title: CVE-2022-23529 in jsonwebtoken@8.5.1
findings.description: Critical prototype pollution allows token forgery.
findings.fix_prompt: Upgrade jsonwebtoken to >=9.0.0.

findings.title: 4 unmaintained dependencies (2+ years)
findings.description: express-validator, passport-local, node-uuid, request — no activity.
findings.fix_prompt: Replace with Zod, custom auth, crypto.randomUUID(), native fetch.

findings.title: Lockfile out of sync
findings.description: 12 packages at wrong versions. Inconsistent installs across environments.
findings.fix_prompt: Delete node_modules + lockfile, npm install fresh.
